title: Set a new password
description: Choose a new password for your account.
successDescription: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in.
invalidLinkDescription: This reset link is missing, invalid, or expired. Request a new reset link to continue.
passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
UNKNOWN_ERROR: We couldn't reset your password. Please try again.
VALIDATION_ERROR: Please check the password fields and try again.
NOT_FOUND: This reset link is invalid or expired.
FORBIDDEN: This reset link is invalid or expired.
